Workday Example Systems Engineer
Location: Toronto, Canada
About the role
You will support systems engineering for complex hardware/software products.
Responsibilities
You will translate requirements, coordinate validation, write technical documents,
and debug integration issues across engineering teams.
Qualifications
Requirements include systems thinking, Python or scripting experience, debugging
skills, and comfort working with cross-functional engineering partners.
